_description: Tests dynamic P/T (characteristic-defining) + ETB composite effect + mid-resolution state churn. Plan: P1 casts Lumra ({4}{G}{G}). She enters with 6 lands -> 6/6. ETB resolves: mill 4 (top 4 cards -> graveyard). Pre-mill graveyard has 3 Forest cards. Library top is arranged so mill produces 2 more Forests + 1 Plains + 1 Mountain. Then 'return all land cards from graveyard to battlefield tapped' puts 5 Forests onto battlefield tapped. After resolution: 11 lands controlled -> Lumra should be 11/11. Common engine bugs: (1) dynamic stats computed once at ETB and cached, (2) not recomputing P/T after the return-lands effect within the same ability, (3) returned lands counted for power but still considered 'in graveyard' for filters, (4) mill sending lands to exile via replacement effects not short-circuiting the return.
